name: Qualified 501(c)(3) Bond Financing

eligibility.description: Must be a 501(c)(3) organization or governmental unit; property must be owned by the 501(c)(3) or government; specific limits apply to non-hospital bonds ($150M) and residential rental housing.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows 501(c)(3) organizations to access tax-exempt bond financing for capital expenditures, including hospitals and educational facilities, effectively lowering the cost of capital.
